'''竏營h-ch-dh''' ('''kazhachadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawk|yawk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawk|yawk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-ch-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhachadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhachadh|thizhachadh]] || [[word:jizhachadh|jizhachadh]] || [[word:shizhachadh|shizhachadh]] || [[word:kizhachadh|kizhachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhachadh|thuthuzhachadh]] || [[word:jujuzhachadh|jujuzhachadh]] || [[word:shushuzhachadh|shushuzhachadh]] || [[word:kukuzhachadh|kukuzhachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhachadh|thuzhachadh]] || [[word:juzhachadh|juzhachadh]] || [[word:shuzhachadh|shuzhachadh]] || [[word:kuzhachadh|kuzhachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhachadh|thuzhachadh]] || [[word:juzhachadh|juzhachadh]] || [[word:shuzhachadh|shuzhachadh]] || [[word:kuzhachadh|kuzhachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhachadh|thezhachadh]] || [[word:jezhachadh|jezhachadh]] || [[word:shezhachadh|shezhachadh]] || [[word:kezhachadh|kezhachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhachadh|thothozhachadh]] || [[word:jojozhachadh|jojozhachadh]] || [[word:shoshozhachadh|shoshozhachadh]] || [[word:kokozhachadh|kokozhachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhachadh|thozhachadh]] || [[word:jozhachadh|jozhachadh]] || [[word:shozhachadh|shozhachadh]] || [[word:kozhachadh|kozhachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhachadh|thozhachadh]] || [[word:jozhachadh|jozhachadh]] || [[word:shozhachadh|shozhachadh]] || [[word:kozhachadh|kozhachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhachadh|thﾃｦzhachadh]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhachadh|jﾃｦzhachadh]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhachadh|shﾃｦzhachadh]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhachadh|kﾃｦzhachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhachadh|thathazhachadh]] || [[word:jajazhachadh|jajazhachadh]] || [[word:shashazhachadh|shashazhachadh]] || [[word:kakazhachadh|kakazhachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhachadh|thazhachadh]] || [[word:jazhachadh|jazhachadh]] || [[word:shazhachadh|shazhachadh]] || [[word:kazhachadh|kazhachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhachadh|thazhachadh]] || [[word:jazhachadh|jazhachadh]] || [[word:shazhachadh|shazhachadh]] || [[word:kazhachadh|kazhachadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhachadh|shazhachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhachadh|goshazhachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhachadh|gokishazhachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhachadhnﾃｼ|shazhachadhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnknﾃｼ|goshazhachadhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhnﾃｼ|gokishazhachadhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhachadhshﾃｫ|shazhachadhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫ|goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhshﾃｫ|gokishazhachadhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachadhro|shazhachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkro|goshazhachadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhro|gokishazhachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachadhmu|shazhachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkmu|goshazhachadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhmu|gokishazhachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhachadhsher|shazhachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnksher|goshazhachadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhsher|gokishazhachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhachadhng|shazhachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkng|goshazhachadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhng|gokishazhachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhachadhya|shazhachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkya|goshazhachadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhya|gokishazhachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhachadhyam|shazhachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkyam|goshazhachadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhyam|gokishazhachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhachadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhachadhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhachadhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachadhnﾃｼro|shazhachadhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnknﾃｼro|goshazhachadhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhnﾃｼro|gokishazhachadhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachadhnﾃｼmu|shazhachadhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnknﾃｼmu|goshazhachadhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhnﾃｼmu|gokishazhachadhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhachadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhachadhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachadhshﾃｫro|shazhachadhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫro|goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhshﾃｫro|gokishazhachadhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachadhshﾃｫmu|shazhachadhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhachadhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhshﾃｫmu|gokishazhachadhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachadhronﾃｼ|shazhachadhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkronﾃｼ|goshazhachadhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhronﾃｼ|gokishazhachadhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachadhroshﾃｫ|shazhachadhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhachadhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhroshﾃｫ|gokishazhachadhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachadhromu|shazhachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkromu|goshazhachadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhromu|gokishazhachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachadhmunﾃｼ|shazhachadhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhachadhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhmunﾃｼ|gokishazhachadhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachadhmushﾃｫ|shazhachadhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhachadhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhmushﾃｫ|gokishazhachadhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachadhmuro|shazhachadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachadhnkmuro|goshazhachadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachadhmuro|gokishazhachadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
